contextBanner: [TBG | Forge Continue Campaign | launcher/runtime/handoff | branch: feat/forge-continue-campaign-handoff]
purpose: Make ForgeContinue.cmd the one-click entry that builds and installs the exact head, handles known native launcher windows, proves the pinned save, travels to town, performs a real visible trade, and hands fresh campaign state to forge, horse, governor, and guild-loop engines with bounded evidence.
ownedScope: known launcher modal traversal through the existing fast frontdoor
exact save identity through the existing visible-trade certifier
one route, arrival, real buy, and visible trade surface
campaign governor decision and guild-loop handoff
per-stage JSON, JSONL, progress, command logs, and English reporting

orderedStages.name: visible-trade-cycle
orderedStages.requiredProof: exact head, loaded save, movement, arrival, real trade delta, visible surface, Manual cleanup

orderedStages.name: forge-handoff
orderedStages.requiredProof: command transport; downstream completion remains separate

orderedStages.name: pack-animal-acquisition
orderedStages.requiredProof: fresh probe with explicit success delta or explicit blocked reason

orderedStages.name: guild-loop-handoff
orderedStages.requiredProof: fresh asynchronous guild-loop evidence or explicit bounded deferral

knownLauncherWindows.unknownWindowPolicy: stop at a bounded launcher state, retain screenshots/logs/context, and do not fabricate runtime progress

forbiddenScope: free gold, inventory, mounts, movement, XP, or stamina
stale or cross-head artifacts accepted as current proof
blocked horse attempt reported as acquisition
command acknowledgement reported as asynchronous completion
unknown launcher windows clicked without PID, HWND, foreground, and classification guards
save deletion or silent save mutation
